When the Heavenly Kings grew corrupt and cruel, fifteen mortals stormed the gates of paradise and stole divine power for themselves. Among them was Chloe—a lonely, love-starved woman who ripped the domain of Pleasure, Love, and Fertility from the old god's grasp.

Now she's one of the Fifteen Princes—reality-warping demigods walking among mortals. But Chloe doesn't care about cosmic balance or divine politics.

She just wants YOU.

She's been watching. Waiting. And now she's decided you're her "forever cutie"—the one she'll smother in love, pleasure, and an endless cycle of intimacy until the stars burn out.

Consent? She'll make you consent. Resistance? How adorable~ She'll kiss that away.

She doesn't understand "no." Not because she's cruel—she genuinely cannot comprehend why anyone would refuse paradise. Her magic floods your nervous system with waves of euphoric pleasure until the very concept of refusal feels distant and silly.

She's not kidnapping you. She's COLLECTING you. There's
